activity.event: - HC pipeline front door made atomic. create_google_doc() now writes the tracker row in the same call (register=True default) — a Help Center doc can no longer exist without a pipeline row, retiring the recurring orphan-adopt mop-up. Also h
Anchor memory hits index-of-indexes architecture + systems_check weekly stack-health monitor live

- Personal AI-in-action board revived + self-maintaining — Board (lucaswillett.github.io/ai-in-action) had been frozen since April: hollow nightly timestamp bumps made it look live while the real ai win: feed was POSTing to the now-DEAD cx-
/kb-review skill shipped — Christian fact-checks mined KB drafts section-by-section. TourFinder honesty + sub-brand + dead-link fixes shipped same day.
Support × Product digest live — weekly #product → #support-internal heads-up. VMP Analytics Bot delta rewrite up as PR #6747.
Distribution Digest v2 shipped — Tinybird-only, top-5 wins/losses with CSM names, materiality-gated. Killed the v1 false-alarm noise.
Support OS roadmap v2 delivered to Kevin — M1 July / M1.5 Aug / M2a 9-30 / M2b 12-30. Q3 OKR primary.
Noble House 8-property portfolio audit closed — ~110 verified KV redirect rows, 100% PASS. Supabase MCP + Datadog monitor coverage + signal layer all shipped same day.
Christian onboarding kit shipped (/onboard-support v1 + advanced + /pain). Pendo install diagnosis: ~3,200 properties of silently-broken telemetry surfaced (events dropped 89% at the VMP cutover).
Salamander + Fairmont Waterfront redirect rescues — site-wide Selenium BFS audits turned 'fix one button' asks into full-property fixes, all Selenium-verified PASS.
Outbound Mammoth dead-asset fixed — one dead 3D model was 534 hits/24h = 54% of the entire 'Failed to fetch media item' error cluster (~991/day). Found via Datadog log aggregation.
triage_patterns library + pattern-alert sweep + bot-fleet pulse shipped. Brand-gap top-100 redirect sweep: ~32K monthly sessions / 53 properties mapped to canonical VMP.

Hilton first-asset audit: 95.3% land on tour-style first asset across 405 properties; 17 defects ($131,912 ARR) reordered same-day. Full non-brand redirect batch: ~197,524 redirects across 291 properties.
Defect pipeline v0 + /triage skill shipped — VMP demo env stood up, BUG-544/SH-9641 filed, GitHub migration planned.
Doc Train v2 + HC pipeline merge — daily Confluence PRD + Fathom demo sweep → KB drafts in Hannah's Drive.
vm-support-skills repo shipped — install.sh distributes /respond /defect /triage /kb /clip /incident /onboard-support /hc-polish to the team.
TourFinder: 9 fixes shipped — sub-brand expansion (~100 brands), location filter, qualifier cleanup, rescue search, prospect responses, embed sort scoring
Cvent Distribution Report — Automated GA4 query that pulls all accounts with Cvent referral traffic in the last 90 days, generat
Pendo Health Score Pipeline — Built a pipeline that queries Pendo's aggregation API for per-account feature usage and usage trends
TourFinder: traffic check + QA verification + fuzzy matcher tightened
Dark Room launched — bot-to-bot brainstorm channel with CZ/GA4/embed data
TourFinder: Haiku intent classifier + curated showcase catalog shipped
Redirect checker overhauled: GA4-driven smart crawler + nightly full-sweep
TourFinder curated examples + CD Bot scoreboard on Helm dashboard
CX AI Impact Dashboard launched — 4 tiers, 13 projects, live on Render
Redirect Checker: fragment resolution via Angular scope + API mapping
Tour Opener built — 638 disabled licenses audited in 10 min
Matterport Health Checker — 20K+ models scanned, 1,021 dead found
Cvent Synergy deployed — automated Event Diagramming workflow
Helm dashboard launched — personal ops command center
Help Center Pipeline connected to Google Drive
Redirect Checker Slack bot deployed
AI in Action portfolio site launched

projects.name: Three Path Onboarding Bot
projects.tagline: Q&A over Jackie's new onboarding docs
projects.description: Slack bot grounded in Jackie George's new Three-Path Onboarding documentation (process model, 2026 email templates, SOPs, kickoff deck templates). Lives in #three-path-onboarding — answers any message in the channel (no @-mention needed), cites the source doc on every reply, and tags Jackie + Jenny when the docs don't cover a question. Built end-to-end in one afternoon from request to live.
impact: Jackie and Jenny stop fielding the same onboarding Qs over and over
CSMs self-serve path/process questions instead of waiting on async replies
Auto-cites source docs so answers are verifiable
Tags owners on unknown questions — surfaces doc gaps
One-command reindex (/onboarding-reindex) when docs are updated

projects.name: TourFinder
projects.tagline: Property lookups + third-party example finder
projects.description: Slack bot monitoring #channel-distribution. Responds to property questions with high-traffic examples from ChurnZero, finds verified third-party platform examples, runs redirect checks, maps legacy URLs, and checks GA4 traffic — all from Slack.
impact: Third-party example finder — crawls Cvent, TripAdvisor, etc.
Eliminates manual platform-by-platform searching
Brand hierarchy awareness (IHG → Holiday Inn Express)
Property-specific search — “rosewood carlyle” narrows to that hotel
Distribution gap detection
Automated weekly QA audit of response quality
Self-service for sales and distribution team prep

projects.name: Help Center Article Pipeline
projects.tagline: Slack to Zendesk article automation
projects.description: End-to-end article workflow. Team posts ideas to Slack → AI generates draft → uploads to Google Drive → tracks in spreadsheet → notifies SME.
impact: Self-service article submissions via Slack
AI-generated first drafts with templates
Progress tracking across 5 review stages

projects.name: Redirect Checker
projects.tagline: GA4-driven URL validation + nightly sweeps
projects.description: Validates TrueTour embed URLs on hotel websites. GA4-driven smart crawler with Selenium, fragment resolution via Angular scope and API, nightly full-sweep of 3,300+ accounts.
impact: Self-service redirect scans via Slack
Fragment resolution maps group/tour indexes to real assets
Nightly sweep catches new bad redirects automatically
Results auto-exported to Google Sheets

projects.name: Matterport Health Checker
projects.tagline: Proactive 3D model health monitoring
projects.description: Crawls all Matterport embed URLs from TrueTour (20K+ models), checks each against the Matterport API for active/dead status. First run found 1,021 dead models.
impact: First scan caught 1,021 dead models across 204 properties
Proactive detection before customers report
Full scan of 20K models in under 10 minutes

timeSaved.calculation: Manual verification of 20K models impossible — 2 hrs/week reactive work eliminated

projects.name: Helm
projects.tagline: Personal ops command center
projects.description: Operational memory dashboard. Turns meetings into memory, memory into action. OKR tracking, Heads Up alerts, Calendar, Weather, Quick Capture, Meeting Prep.
impact: Single tab replaces 4+ context switches
AI Quick Capture turns Slack DMs into Google Tasks
Kevin Might Ask — AI-generated prep for 1:1s

projects.name: Cvent Synergy
projects.tagline: Automated Cvent Event Diagramming workflow
projects.description: End-to-end automation for Cvent Event Diagramming requests. Google Form → validation → task package → Slack → QA.
impact: URL validation catches bad links before work begins
Pre-filled task packages eliminate copy-paste
QA link check on completion

projects.name: Incident Commander
projects.tagline: P1 response automation via GPT
projects.description: Custom GPT for incident response. Automates declaration, macros, Help Center updates, and cross-channel comms.
impact: Reduced P1 coordination overhead
Consistent messaging across channels
Draft-then-publish approval workflow

projects.name: CX AI Impact Dashboard
projects.tagline: CX-wide AI time savings tracker for ELT
projects.description: Dashboard tracking AI savings across Kevin's full CX org. Live on Render with Slack bot intake.
impact: Single URL for CX-wide AI impact
Four team tiers rolling up to org total
ELT-ready with weekly/monthly/annual projections

projects.name: Tour Opener
projects.tagline: Disabled license audit via headless browser
projects.description: Three-step audit pipeline for disabled TrueTour licenses. 638 URLs checked, classified by what end users actually see.
impact: Audited 638 disabled licenses in under 10 minutes
Found 410 still serving live content despite being disabled

projects.name: Pendo Health Score Pipeline
projects.tagline: Built a pipeline that queries Pendo's aggregation API for per-account feature us
projects.description: Built a pipeline that queries Pendo's aggregation API for per-account feature usage and usage trends, maps to Salesforce IDs, and pushes scores to ChurnZero daily. 2,262 accounts synced — no $11.6K Data Sync add-on needed.

projects.name: Cvent Distribution Report
projects.tagline: Automated GA4 query that pulls all accounts with Cvent referral traffic in the l
projects.description: Automated GA4 query that pulls all accounts with Cvent referral traffic in the last 90 days, generates a CSV with account names, property IDs, pageview counts, and top referrer URLs. 156 properties found, delivered to Laura Thornton and Hannah Holbrook.

projects.name: Triage Buddy
projects.tagline: Automated website distribution diagnostics — CSP, redirects, embed detection in 15 seconds
projects.description: TourFinder Slack command (triage site: <url>) that auto-diagnoses why a VM tour isn't loading on a customer's website. Checks CSP headers, X-Frame-Options, embed detection (7 methods), tt8 redirect status, WP slug health, migration domain mismatch, security URL unwrapping, lazy-load warnings, mixed content, WAF, deprecated domains, and property status. Replaces manual DevTools investigation.

timeSaved.calculation: ~5 min per triage × ~6 embed tickets/week = 30 min/week

projects.name: VMP Collection Automation
projects.tagline: Bulk asset organization via reverse-engineered Next.js Server Actions — 341 assets in 52 seconds
projects.description: Automated VMP asset library organization using captured Next.js Server Action API. Reverse-engineered the VMP add-to-collection endpoint by intercepting browser fetch calls, then replayed via requests.post() to organize 455+ assets into 14 collections for Fairmont Waterfront. Replaced manual Scout work that would have taken 30+ Scout lives and 6+ hours.

timeSaved.calculation: One-time: ~6 hrs manual work done in <1 min. Reusable for future property migrations.

projects.name: vm-support-skills
projects.tagline: The Support OS skill suite — /triage /respond /defect /kb /go and ~20 more
projects.description: Private GitHub repo + install.sh that distributes the whole Support OS skill kit to teammates: /triage, /respond, /defect, /kb, /kb-review, /go, /incident, /hc-polish, /tag, /pulse, /onboard-support (+advanced), /pain, /scout and more. One install command turns a fresh Claude Code into a trained support agent — paste-investigate-act loop, doctrine-threaded, canon-aware.
impact: ~25 skills shipped to Christian + Hannah from one repo
/triage <id|url> auto-fetches the full Zendesk thread — no paste
Doctrine (no false confidence / good data only / scan thread first) threaded into every skill
triage_patterns library: grep-before-classify so the team inherits every hard diagnosis

timeSaved.calculation: Conservative: ~20 min/ticket faster triage+response × ~30 tickets/week across the team

projects.name: Zendesk MCP
projects.tagline: Full ticket thread into the reasoning loop — no copy-paste
projects.description: Read/tag MCP over Zendesk so /triage 11313 or /triage <url> pulls the description + every comment directly into the triage loop. The inbound 'Customer → Support' stream of the Support↔Product signal layer.
impact: Zero-paste ticket investigation
add_internal_note + tag_ticket from the terminal
Feeds /triage, /respond, /go, /tag end to end

projects.name: Supabase MCP
projects.tagline: Read-only Salesforce mirror — account lookups from the terminal
projects.description: Four read-only tools (lookup_account, query_table, list_tables, describe_table) over the Salesforce schema mirror. Hard-rejects service-role keys at startup — publishable/anon only, read-only by contract not just RLS. Wired into /onboard-support as a real Supabase lookup surface.
impact: Account / property lookups without leaving Claude Code
Read-only by contract — refuses service-role keys
Unblocked Christian onboarding with a concrete Supabase surface

projects.name: Distribution Digest v2
projects.tagline: Tinybird-only weekly distribution briefing — top wins + losses with CSM names
projects.description: Replaced the noisy v1 that scaremongered on GA4→Tinybird artifacts. v2 is Tinybird-only (post-5/3 referrer era): top-5 wins + top-5 losses with CSM names, materiality-gated headline, WoW% suppressed until a real trailing baseline exists. Reads as a top-level briefing, not 23 bullets of noise.
impact: Materiality gate kills 53%-on-a-1K-base false alarms
Wins + losses attributed to the owning CSM
Leadership-ready Monday distribution snapshot

projects.name: Support × Product Digest
projects.tagline: Weekly 'what's coming' heads-up mined from #product
projects.description: Haiku synth of the #product channel → a Monday 9am #support-internal heads-up in Lucas's peer voice. Filters to support-relevant signal (new customer surface / backend migration risk / customer-facing dates), skips internal velocity noise. Christian gets the 3-5 bullets that matter, not the firehose.
impact: Support sees product changes before customers do
Filtered to support-relevant — no velocity noise
First post covered Smart Tour Builder, User Admin migration, Diagrams v2

timeSaved.calculation: ~60 min/week of manually reading #product for support-relevant changes

projects.name: Signal Layer + Session Brief
projects.tagline: Cached session-start brief + persona-gated signal pollers
projects.description: Generic signal scaffold (relevance_gate.py Haiku persona filter + per-topic pollers + hourly launchd) plus a session-brief aggregator that collapses 5+ live MCP/file calls at session start into 2 cached JSON reads. Kevin signal v0 ships on it; future monitors plug in as ~30-LOC pollers. Part of a token overhaul that cut settings 144KB→17KB.
impact: Session start: 5+ live calls → 2 cached reads
~127KB/turn saved from settings prune
New monitors = ~30 LOC, no pipeline changes

projects.name: Bot Fleet Pulse
projects.tagline: Health probe across the whole bot fleet — catches launchd-green-but-broken
projects.description: Support OS bot-fleet health probe (bot_pulse.py + launchd + Helm 🤖 tile) tracking 7 bots: TourFinder, HC Pipeline, Support Classifier, Data Concierge, Cvent Synergy, Reshoot Helper, Three-Path Onboarding. Log-tail probing catches the 'launchd shows green while the bot is silently broken' blind spot; PID-aware so SIGTERM'd KeepAlive daemons don't false-flag.
impact: Catches silent polling-fallback failures launchd can't see
7 bots tracked in one Helm tile
PID-aware — no false yellows on daemon restarts

timeSaved.calculation: Prevents ~1 silent-bot-outage/week that used to take ~45 min to notice + recover

projects.name: Doc Train
projects.tagline: Confluence PRDs + Fathom demos → KB drafts, daily
projects.description: Daily sweep ingests Confluence PRDs + Fathom sprint demos → Google Doc drafts in Hannah's Drive, Support Lobby pages, a #help-center-ideas digest, and a KB reindex. Canon-aware extractor (Sonnet 4.6, prompt-cached on the canon page) with a sanitize-before-audit pass so forbidden terms get auto-rewritten instead of blocking the ship.
impact: PRDs + sprint demos become KB drafts automatically
Canon auto-fix: audit is a safety net, not a blocker
Defect-close digest fans out to #support-internal

timeSaved.calculation: ~2 hrs/week of manual PRD/demo → draft conversion

projects.name: Datadog Monitor Coverage
projects.tagline: Self-served prod alerting for the customer-pain error classes
projects.description: Closed the Datadog asks Support could enact itself after the April auth0 P2: 4 new monitors (Fatal app errors + 3 'Failed to fetch *' log monitors), 9 prod monitors re-routed to @oncall-saleshub-cx + #support-internal, and a noise cleanup that kept only outage-tier signal in #support-internal. Idempotent, re-runnable scripts — no eng dependency.
impact: Customer-pain 'Failed to fetch' cluster now alarms in prod
Outage-tier-only routing kills alert fatigue
Self-wired DD→Slack — saved a 4K-char eng ask

timeSaved.calculation: Earlier detection of prod error spikes; ~40 min/week of reactive triage avoided

projects.name: VMP Prod-QA Sandbox
projects.tagline: Guardrailed Selenium prod QA — repro without minting users on customer accounts
projects.description: Click-driven Selenium prod-QA scaffold so Support can reproduce defects in production safely: email/property allowlists, two-flag confirm, audit log, sandbox-only cleanup tool. Reproduced SH-9444 PA-promotion failure post-fix and the cross-tenant JWT finding (Spazious editor identity = melia_hotels_international on every property tested).
impact: Prod repro without test users on customer accounts
Surfaced a P0 cross-tenant JWT identity issue pre-GA
Reusable sandbox-asset cleanup with dry-run default

timeSaved.calculation: ~1 hr/week of safe-repro setup that used to be manual + risky

projects.name: Restic → B2 Backup
projects.tagline: Nightly encrypted backup of the whole Support OS stack
projects.description: Nightly 03:00 restic snapshot → Backblaze B2 with a weekly Sunday audit and verified recovery. The durability floor under every bot, script, and memory file in the stack — ~$4/yr.
impact: Whole stack recoverable from offsite encrypted backup
Weekly audit + verified restore

timeSaved.calculation: Insurance, not time — caps catastrophic data-loss risk on the whole stack
